name: Spicy Brown Rice & Vegetable Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: Leek (white and pale green parts only), cut lengthwise into thin strips
Carrot, peeled, shredded into thin strips
Zucchini, trimmed, cut into long matchstick-size strips
Fresh shiitake mushrooms, stems trimmed, cut into thin strips
Cold cooked brown rice (about 1 cup uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
Heat oil in a heavy large nonstick skillet over high heat.
Add garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add leek, carrot, zucchini, shiitake mushrooms, snow peas, and stir-fry until just tender, about 3 minutes.
Add rice and toss to combine.
Add oyster sauce, water, and chili paste; stir-fry until sauce is evenly distributed and mixture is heated through, about 2 minutes.
Mound in a large bowl. Garnish with green onions and serve immediately.
